---
title: "Policies for Using AI"
format:
  html: default
  revealjs:
    output-file: ai-use-policies-slides.html
  pdf:
    output-file: ai-use-policies-handout.pdf
  docx:
    output-file: ai-use-policies.docx
---

[AI-powered coding assistants](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/AI-assisted_software_development)
can dramatically accelerate and improve your work,
but they require careful and responsible use.
Lab members who use AI tools must adhere to the following guidelines.

::: {.callout-warning}
## Technology in Rapid Evolution

As of early 2026,
AI coding assistant technology is changing extremely rapidly,
and we are just beginning to figure out how to use these tools effectively ourselves.
All information on this site should be taken with extra caution,
as best practices and capabilities continue to evolve.
:::

# Responsibility for validation

{{< include ai-tools/responsibility-for-validation.qmd >}}

# Disclosure of AI use {#sec-ai-disclosure}

{{< include ai-tools/disclosure-of-ai-use.qmd >}}

# Attribution of sources

{{< include ai-tools/attribution-of-sources.qmd >}}

# Using AI for Journal Articles {#sec-ai-journal-articles}

{{< include ai-tools/ai-for-academic-writing.qmd >}}

# References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
